content: being forced to send an email so I can watch a show from a device that is logged into the account before on my home Wi-Fi is ridiculous. You almost killed piracy with this app because it was so much better and then you killed your own app.

Rapidly becoming the worst streaming app available. New available content sucks, and they're constantly trying to force out bad original content as well. Always increasing costs to justify different price tiers to add in more advertising and constantly changing their layout, making it nearly impossible to find anything you actually WANT to watch and pushing the things that THEY want you to watch. I would give this zero stars if it were an option.

My only concern is that One Piece episodes are always delayed, and some arcs are also missing, I hope you’ll add the complete arcs in the future and keep it updated. Pricy din siya, To be honest, One Piece is the only thing I’m waiting for here.
